response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{-18, 7, 8, 7, -17, 13, 13, 21, -9\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the sample mean ($\bar{x}$)

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{-18 + 7 + 8 + 7 + (-17) + 13 + 13 + 21 + (-9)}{9}
$$

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{-18 + 7 + 8 + 7 - 17 + 13 + 13 + 21 - 9}{9}
$$

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{(-18 - 17 - 9) + (7 + 8 + 7 + 13 + 13 + 21)}{9}
$$

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{-44 + 68}{9} = \frac{24}{9} = \frac{8}{3}
$$

---
